inputs.timeline_data:
{"segments":[{"id":"1782389292685ecqv2","start":0,"length":718,"prompt":"1. Base Positive Prompt (Fixed Character, Scene, Realism Lock, All Frames Consistent)
Ultra photorealistic cinematic movie shot, 8K RAW footage, hyper-detailed textures, gritty post-apocalyptic aesthetic, desaturated cold muted color grading, heavy film grain, high dynamic range, natural diffused overcast storm light, floating smoke and dust between collapsed buildings, raw realistic skin with dirt, scrapes and sweat, worn weathered fabric, rusted corroded metal on abandoned cars, chaotic rubble ground, consistent character appearance and entire ruin environment matching reference image for all 30 seconds, dynamic shifting camera angles, smooth fluid motion, sharp motion blur on fast fighting movements, atmospheric haze, depth of field, Hollywood blockbuster action lighting
Fixed Character Lock (No costume/face change throughout video)
Young woman: short wavy dark hair, patched multi-color stitched denim jumpsuit covered in mud, standing on left in reference image, agile fighting movement, worn knuckles
Asian middle-aged man: short black hair, scar on right cheek, thick stained dark long coat, dark trousers, standing on right in reference image, powerful heavy combat style, bruised jaw
Fixed Scene Lock (No scene replacement, all background objects stay intact)
Surrounded by collapsed half-destroyed high-rise apartment blocks, rusted bullet-holed abandoned sedans on both sides, ground filled with broken concrete, garbage and rubble, thin white smoke drifting from building wreckage, muddy dusty wasteland ground, broken steel rebar protruding from ruined buildings
2. 30 Second Shot-by-Shot Dynamic Action Prompt (Continuous Fighting + Camera Angle Shifts, Smooth Sequential Action)
Total 30 seconds seamless intense fight sequence, dynamic shifting camera perspectives, moderate fast combat motion, natural weighty physical impact, realistic body collision motion blur:
Shot 1 (0-5s, Original medium full shot same as reference image): The two stand back-to-back tense, both exhausted yet alert, woman twists body to launch a fast elbow strike toward the man, man blocks with forearm, heavy impact sound visual cues, camera fixed original framing
Shot 2 (5-11s, Low angle tracking shot, camera slowly rises upward): Man counterattacks with a sweeping leg kick, woman jumps to dodge, stumbles onto rusted car hood, metal dents under her weight, dust flies up from ground rubble
Shot 3 (11-17s, Over-the-shoulder close shot from man’s back): Woman grabs scrap metal debris off the ground to swing, man blocks coat arm, fabric tears slightly, both faces tense with exertion, sweat streaks down dirty skin
Shot 4 (17-23s, Side sliding dolly wide shot, camera moves horizontally left): They grapple and tumble across rubble ground, crash into rusted abandoned sedan, car door slams open, loose trash scatters everywhere, smoke swirls around their bodies
Shot 5 (23-30s, Slightly elevated overhead medium shot, slow pull back): Man pushes woman away forcefully, they separate a few meters apart, both gasping heavily, bruised and covered in dust, tense standoff at the end of sequence, heavy exhausted breathing expressions
3. Universal Negative Prompt (Prevent Distortion, Styling Drift, Visual Defects)
cartoon, anime, 3D clay render, illustration, painting, sketch, bright saturated warm colors, clear sunny sky, intact clean buildings, brand new undamaged cars, spotless clean clothes, flawless smooth skin, deformed facial features, distorted limbs, extra/missing fingers, blurry low resolution, ugly disfigured characters, text watermarks, floating text overlays, static locked single camera only, slow boring idle movement, glowing fantasy effects, flowers, green vegetation, crowds of extra people, chibi mini figures, soft pastel aesthetic, fake plastic textures, excessive glowing lens flare, unnatural stiff robot movement
4. ComfyUI LTX2.3 Operation Guide (English)
Input reference image to img2video node, reference image style weight set 0.82 ~ 0.9 to lock original character face, clothing and ruin city layout
Frame count: 60 frames (30s at standard 24fps), motion bucket value set 14 ~ 18 to support smooth fast fight motion without severe character deformation
The prompt contains multiple dynamic camera shifts (original medium shot, low angle tracking, over-shoulder close-up, side dolly wide shot, overhead pull-back shot) to meet variable perspective requirements
Motion blur is emphasized in positive prompt to reduce jitter during fast combat movements
All scene, character, camera and action descriptions use English as required; no Chinese dialogue lines in this fight scene script","type":"image","imageFile":"SceneName_00014_.png","imageB64":"/api/view?filename=SceneName_00014_.png&type=input&subfolder="}],"audioSegments":[]}
inputs.local_prompts:
1. Base Positive Prompt (Fixed Character, Scene, Realism Lock, All Frames Consistent)
Ultra photorealistic cinematic movie shot, 8K RAW footage, hyper-detailed textures, gritty post-apocalyptic aesthetic, desaturated cold muted color grading, heavy film grain, high dynamic range, natural diffused overcast storm light, floating smoke and dust between collapsed buildings, raw realistic skin with dirt, scrapes and sweat, worn weathered fabric, rusted corroded metal on abandoned cars, chaotic rubble ground, consistent character appearance and entire ruin environment matching reference image for all 30 seconds, dynamic shifting camera angles, smooth fluid motion, sharp motion blur on fast fighting movements, atmospheric haze, depth of field, Hollywood blockbuster action lighting
Fixed Character Lock (No costume/face change throughout video)
Young woman: short wavy dark hair, patched multi-color stitched denim jumpsuit covered in mud, standing on left in reference image, agile fighting movement, worn knuckles
Asian middle-aged man: short black hair, scar on right cheek, thick stained dark long coat, dark trousers, standing on right in reference image, powerful heavy combat style, bruised jaw
Fixed Scene Lock (No scene replacement, all background objects stay intact)
Surrounded by collapsed half-destroyed high-rise apartment blocks, rusted bullet-holed abandoned sedans on both sides, ground filled with broken concrete, garbage and rubble, thin white smoke drifting from building wreckage, muddy dusty wasteland ground, broken steel rebar protruding from ruined buildings
2. 30 Second Shot-by-Shot Dynamic Action Prompt (Continuous Fighting + Camera Angle Shifts, Smooth Sequential Action)
Total 30 seconds seamless intense fight sequence, dynamic shifting camera perspectives, moderate fast combat motion, natural weighty physical impact, realistic body collision motion blur:
Shot 1 (0-5s, Original medium full shot same as reference image): The two stand back-to-back tense, both exhausted yet alert, woman twists body to launch a fast elbow strike toward the man, man blocks with forearm, heavy impact sound visual cues, camera fixed original framing
Shot 2 (5-11s, Low angle tracking shot, camera slowly rises upward): Man counterattacks with a sweeping leg kick, woman jumps to dodge, stumbles onto rusted car hood, metal dents under her weight, dust flies up from ground rubble
Shot 3 (11-17s, Over-the-shoulder close shot from man’s back): Woman grabs scrap metal debris off the ground to swing, man blocks coat arm, fabric tears slightly, both faces tense with exertion, sweat streaks down dirty skin
Shot 4 (17-23s, Side sliding dolly wide shot, camera moves horizontally left): They grapple and tumble across rubble ground, crash into rusted abandoned sedan, car door slams open, loose trash scatters everywhere, smoke swirls around their bodies
Shot 5 (23-30s, Slightly elevated overhead medium shot, slow pull back): Man pushes woman away forcefully, they separate a few meters apart, both gasping heavily, bruised and covered in dust, tense standoff at the end of sequence, heavy exhausted breathing expressions
3. Universal Negative Prompt (Prevent Distortion, Styling Drift, Visual Defects)
cartoon, anime, 3D clay render, illustration, painting, sketch, bright saturated warm colors, clear sunny sky, intact clean buildings, brand new undamaged cars, spotless clean clothes, flawless smooth skin, deformed facial features, distorted limbs, extra/missing fingers, blurry low resolution, ugly disfigured characters, text watermarks, floating text overlays, static locked single camera only, slow boring idle movement, glowing fantasy effects, flowers, green vegetation, crowds of extra people, chibi mini figures, soft pastel aesthetic, fake plastic textures, excessive glowing lens flare, unnatural stiff robot movement
4. ComfyUI LTX2.3 Operation Guide (English)
Input reference image to img2video node, reference image style weight set 0.82 ~ 0.9 to lock original character face, clothing and ruin city layout
Frame count: 60 frames (30s at standard 24fps), motion bucket value set 14 ~ 18 to support smooth fast fight motion without severe character deformation
The prompt contains multiple dynamic camera shifts (original medium shot, low angle tracking, over-shoulder close-up, side dolly wide shot, overhead pull-back shot) to meet variable perspective requirements
Motion blur is emphasized in positive prompt to reduce jitter during fast combat movements
All scene, character, camera and action descriptions use English as required; no Chinese dialogue lines in this fight scene script
